mapper.select: SELECT * FROM music ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM music WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR artist LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') ORDER BY play_count DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO music(title, artist, album, mood_tag, duration_ms, music_path, cover_path, lyric_path) VALUES (#{title}, #{artist}, #{album}, #{moodTag}, #{durationMs}, #{musicPath}, #{coverPath}, #{lyricPath})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM music
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR artist LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR album LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE music SET title = #{title}, artist = #{artist}, album = #{album}, mood_tag = #{moodTag}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, music_path = #{musicPath}, cover_path = #{coverPath}, lyric_path = #{lyricPath} WHERE id = #{id}
